snapshot_metadata.note: A small, SYNTHETIC, by-construction clinical SAMPLE pack for the Community Edition — the ambient-scribe note-review domain expressed as an independent tier:core pack (its OWN ontology + council_roles + taxonomy, no packs/healthcare/ reuse). It is NOT the full curated Pro `healthcare` pack (real calibrated corpus + calibration loop), which stays separately distributed. Under LITHRIM_BENCH_PACK=clinical_scribe the FROZEN council resolves its tiers (pack_tiers), Tier-1 owner-map (pack_tier1_owners), roster identity (pack_production_judges), and lens authority (pack_lenses) entirely from THIS snapshot. production_judges reuses the role NAMES of the core deployable trio (the PACK-2c boundary — a pack subsets KNOWN deployable identities; it does NOT introduce a new deployable judge). tier: core = the OSS sample tier.
